event: perforated mucinous cystadenoma of the appendix
advised to undergo peritonectomy and bilateral oophorectomy
heated intraperitoneal infusions of mitomycin C
difficulty identifying uterine cervix on ultrasonography
urinary bladder covered the anterior part of the uterus
Doppler USG ruled out renal vein thrombosis
pigtail inserted into the left ureter
blood creatinine level returned to normal
follow-up with oncologist, hematologist, and urologist
